name: Consumer Auto Credit
description_short: Consumer Auto Credit Inc is a Tampa, FL used car dealer offering in-house auto financing for buyers with bad credit, no credit, or challenged histories.
description_long:
Consumer Auto Credit Inc is a used car dealership located at 6706 N Florida Ave in Tampa, Florida. Operating under the website 813trucks.com, the company specializes in selling pre-owned vehicles while simultaneously providing the consumer auto financing needed to purchase them. Their dual role as both dealer and lender makes them a one-stop shop for buyers who struggle to obtain conventional auto loans through banks or credit unions. They serve the Tampa community and surrounding areas with Spanish-speaking staff on hand.

The dealership carries a broad inventory spanning model years 2011 through 2023 across brands including Ford, Chevrolet, Toyota, Honda, Nissan, BMW, Land Rover, Mercedes-Benz, and Audi, among others. Body styles range from pickups and SUVs to sedans, vans, and cargo vehicles. On the financing side, Consumer Auto Credit offers buy here pay here (BHPH) in-house financing, bad credit financing, no credit financing, and arrangements through multiple third-party lenders. They advertise fast loan approval, low down payments, and competitive rates, along with the ability to pre-qualify for an auto loan on-site.

Several features distinguish Consumer Auto Credit from generic used car lots. They offer limited warranty options on many vehicles, providing some protection against unexpected repair costs post-purchase. Trade-ins are accepted, easing the transition from an existing vehicle. Military discounts are available for service members. Spanish-language sales support is explicitly advertised, broadening accessibility for Tampa's Hispanic community. An in-house auto service department handles routine maintenance, repairs, and inspections.

This is fundamentally a subprime auto dealer operating a buy here pay here model. Buyers who cannot qualify elsewhere will find the financing accessible, but should expect interest rates considerably above prime. The use of a Gmail address (5505tampatrucks@gmail.com) for sales inquiries suggests a small independent operation rather than a franchise or multi-location group. Consumers should review all loan terms carefully before signing, as BHPH financing typically carries higher APRs and stricter repayment conditions than conventional auto loans.
pros: Accepts bad credit and no credit — explicitly targets buyers turned away by banks
Buy here pay here in-house financing available, no third-party lender required
Relationships with multiple lenders provide alternative paths to approval
Spanish-speaking staff on site for bilingual buyers
Military discounts offered to active and veteran service members
Limited warranty options available on many inventory vehicles
In-house auto service department for maintenance and repairs post-purchase
cons: Buy here pay here model typically carries significantly higher interest rates than conventional auto loans
Physical Tampa, FL location only — no online purchasing or remote financing process
Inventory is used vehicles exclusively, model years 2011–2023
Sales contact email is a personal Gmail address, indicating a small independent operation with limited infrastructure
No transparent rate or fee disclosures visible on the website
best_for: Buyers with bad credit or no credit history who need a vehicle and financing in one place
First-time car buyers in the Tampa, FL area
Spanish-speaking buyers who need bilingual sales support
Military personnel eligible for the advertised discount
diagnosis: Consumer Auto Credit Inc is best suited for Tampa-area buyers with damaged or nonexistent credit who need both a vehicle and financing under one roof. The main caveat is that buy here pay here financing almost always carries high interest rates — borrowers who can qualify elsewhere should compare total loan costs before committing.
services: Used vehicle sales (2011–2023, multiple makes and body styles)
In-house / buy here pay here auto financing
Limited warranty options on select vehicles
